requirements: Use async/await, fetch API, query-parameter construction, JSON parsing, and explicit error handling.
test_desc: Validates fetch behavior, query string handling, headers, JSON parsing, and error propagation.
business_context: A backend integration client is being ported from a Python service to a Node.js edge worker that calls the same user profile API.
stakeholder_request: Preserve request semantics exactly so the Node client can be dropped into production without breaking analytics attribution or error handling.
acceptance_checks: Carry over query parameter behavior for includeDetails
Preserve required headers used by downstream observability
Raise an error on non-OK responses instead of silently returning data
pitfalls: Do not forget to append the source marker header
Do not build URLs with brittle string concatenation when URL utilities are available
runtime_budget: This code is intended for latency-sensitive request handling in a service edge path.
